properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will sing about everything You are always I will tell the world everything You've done in me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I stand on higher ground I was lost but now I'm here

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With You, my refuge, my stronghold Always with You, faithful one, holding on I am always with You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The future of the world is within Your hands of love Love reaches me, I am in awe of You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Well, I stand on higher ground I was lost but now I'm here

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: With You, my refuge, my stronghold, Always with You, faithful one, holding on, I am always with You, my refuge, my stronghold, Always with You, faithful one, holding on, I am always with You.
